query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `smart_plans` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`triggerLeadSourceId` int,
	`status` enum('active','paused') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `smart_plans_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `smart_plan_steps` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`planId` int NOT NULL,
	`stepOrder` int NOT NULL,
	`channel` enum('email','sms') NOT NULL,
	`delayDays` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`delayHours` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`subject` varchar(255),
	`body` text NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_steps_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `smart_plan_enrollments` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`planId` int NOT NULL,
	`contactId` int NOT NULL,
	`currentStepIndex` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`enrolledAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`nextStepAt` timestamp,
	`status` enum('active','paused','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
	`completedAt` timestamp,
	CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_enrollments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `smart_plan_executions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`enrollmentId` int NOT NULL,
	`stepId` int NOT NULL,
	`channel` enum('email','sms') NOT NULL,
	`sentAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`status` enum('sent','failed','skipped') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sent',
	`errorMessage` text,
	CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_executions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

ALTER TABLE `smart_plans` ADD CONSTRAINT `smart_plans_triggerLeadSourceId_lead_sources_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`triggerLeadSourceId`) REFERENCES `lead_sources`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;

ALTER TABLE `smart_plan_steps` ADD CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_steps_planId_smart_plans_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`planId`) REFERENCES `smart_plans`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;

ALTER TABLE `smart_plan_enrollments` ADD CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_enrollments_planId_smart_plans_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`planId`) REFERENCES `smart_plans`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;

ALTER TABLE `smart_plan_enrollments` ADD CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_enrollments_contactId_contacts_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`contactId`) REFERENCES `contacts`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;

ALTER TABLE `smart_plan_executions` ADD CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_executions_enrollmentId_smart_plan_enrollments_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`enrollmentId`) REFERENCES `smart_plan_enrollments`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;

ALTER TABLE `smart_plan_executions` ADD CONSTRAINT `smart_plan_executions_stepId_smart_plan_steps_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`stepId`) REFERENCES `smart_plan_steps`(`id`) ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;
